content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Wi-Fi". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1216/problem/F
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of points. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers xi and yi — the coordinates of the i-th point.
content.outputFormat: Print the minimum possible value of D.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the minimum distance between all pairs of points and return the minimum distance.
